text:
先に進めそうね。
ほらほら、どんどん行きましょ！

/ci4 1 ったく、終始あんな感じかよ……
相棒、平気か？
おれは、もうくたくただぜ。

We can get through here.
Come on, come on! Let's keep moving!

/ci4 1 Yeesh, this kid's wound up tighter than a group
of ARKS vets in battle formation. How can you
put up with that, mate? It's exhausting.
